free_text: Absolute cross sections and excitation functions for
alpha particles induced reactions on bromine between
10 and 24.0 MeV.
The targets were made of analytical grade NaBr
evaporated onto 2.7 mg/cm**2 Al backings. The average
weight of the samples was about 0.3 mg/cm**2.
Corrections for geometry, backscattering and absorption
Background and counting losses
SB
SD: DECAY-DATA corrected in Subents 004,008.
SD: Corrections in all Subents.
SD: Corrections in several Subents.
*By authors*.These cross sections could be in error
because of the uncertainties in the decay scheme.
No information about source of uncertainty
